name: Church of the East
note: Also called Nestorian Christianity; rejected the Council of Ephesus (431) which declared Mary 'Mother of God'. Spread east along the Silk Road — reached India (Thomas Christians), China (Tang Dynasty stele 781), Mongolia, and Central Asia. The dominant Christian tradition of the Middle East before the Islamic conquest. Largely destroyed by Tamerlane's massacres (1380s–1400s).
